name: Synup Social vs. Planable
hero_summary: Synup Social takes Planable’s collaboration tools to the next level. If you’re tired of Planable’s rudimentary scheduling and publishing features and buggy interface, try Synup Social! An advanced collaboration platform perfect for agencies and brands alike, we bring a fresh and intuitive ease to interfacing with clients and your team. After all, social media should be fun! Make things simple again with seamlessly integrated approval workflows for your internal team and shareable links for your clients to approve posts, make comments, and even view analytics. See for yourself!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: We upped the ante on Planable’s beloved collaboration capabilities. From dynamic analytics reports to shareable calendars that your clients can view any time to comment on or approve posts, collaboration is easy. Your clients don’t even need a login!
section_2_slider_1_summary: We upped the ante on Planable’s beloved collaboration capabilities. From dynamic analytics reports to shareable calendars that your clients can view any time to comment on or approve posts, collaboration is easy. Your clients don’t even need a login!
section_2_slider_2_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_2_summary: Post creation is our specialty. Whether you’re working for multiple clients or managing your own brand’s social media presence, Synup Social’s AI-powered post creator gives you content that converts - all in your brand’s distinct voice. We use AI to revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. Say goodbye to writers’ block, and hello to engagement!
section_2_step_3_summary: Planable doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation and strategy. Synup Social gives you game-changing recommendations and insights, from the best time to post to post-by-post analytics. See what’s driving engagement, then use our AI-powered post creator to create your best posts! Plus, share analytics via downloadable reports or shareable, white-labeled links - so your boss (or clients!) can see your growth without logging into the platform.
section_2_slider_4_summary: While Planable doesn’t support multi-location business posting, Synup Social allows you to schedule posts for multiple locations or brands simultaneously, making it perfect for agencies and large brands alike. With one account, you can manage all your profiles in one place! And with revolutionary white-labeling on everything from social media calendars to analytics reports, Synup Social gives you all the credit.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Planable?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: We up the ante on Planable’s popular collaboration abilities, helping your team thrive with advanced features on a streamlined interface. Synup Social saves you time and money by inspiring your team and building better workflows. From post-creation and trend research to analytics, Synup Social is the perfect choice for small businesses and agencies alike! Keep your team inspired and efficient with features like a collaborative approval workflow, AI-powered post ideas and shareable, white-labeled analytics and post calendars. There’s no doubt about it: Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed! Let’s see how they stack up:

seo.title: The Best Planable Alternative for Agencies and Brands
seo.description: Synup Social is a powerful social media collaboration platform that takes Planable's collaboration tools to the next level. With Synup Social, you can save time and energy, collaborate seamlessly with clients and your team, and make data-driven decisions for unmatched growth.
